ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., LR, KNN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model and its use case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is archived and no longer in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., AUC, F-Score) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric and its significance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balancing_techniques" (
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balancing technique */,
  "technique_name" TEXT /* Name of the technique (e.g., SMOTE, ROS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technique and its purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technique was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the technique */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technique_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmarking result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model evaluated */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric used in evaluation */,
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* ID of the balancing technique applied */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the performance metric */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation associated with the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_technique_id FOREIGN KEY ("technique_id") REFERENCES balancing_techniques ("technique_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username used for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "date_uploaded" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dataset is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the evaluation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model evaluated */,
  "date_evaluated" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* ID of the balancing technique applied */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the evaluation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_technique_id FOREIGN KEY ("technique_id") REFERENCES balancing_techniques ("technique_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was released */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result associated with the visualization */,
  "visualization_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_visualizations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation that generated the report */,
  "report_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance summary entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "average_auc" REAL /* Average AUC across evaluations */,
  "average_f_score" REAL /* Average F-Score across evaluations */,
  "average_g_mean" REAL /* Average G-Mean across evaluations */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_summary_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_settings" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was first added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
